title: RadAnnotate: Large Language Models for Efficient and Reliable Radiology Report Annotation
summary: arXiv:2603.16002v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Radiology report annotation is essential for clinical NLP, yet manual labeling is slow and costly.
